input.user_input: How does this lease agreement define 'tenant default' and what remedies does the landlord have?

actual:
It appears you haven't attached or provided the text of the lease agreement. 

Could you please upload the document or paste the relevant text? Once you provide it, I can review the specific terms to tell you exactly how "tenant default" is defined and what remedies are available to the landlord under that agreement. 

*(Typically, a tenant default includes failure to pay rent, breach of lease covenants, or abandonment, and landlord remedies often include eviction, terminating the lease, or suing for damages—but I will need to see your specific contract to give you an accurate answer.)*
